Welcome to Cafe and

CREAMERY

Indulge in our exquisite slow-churned gelato crafted with local vine-ripened raspberries, pure Belgian chocolate, and sweet dairy cream. Every batch represents our lifelong obsession with sensory confectionery perfection.

Order Now
★ 4.9/5 Rating (2k+ Connoisseurs)
❄ Freshly Churned Daily
Fresh Voted #1 Gelato

Flavour of the Week

Chilled Raspberry Charcoal Craft

100%

Organic Berries

Preservatives

The Craftsmanship Secrets

Slow churned,
infinitely rich.

Our recipes date back multiple generations, blending absolute devotion to fine pastry arts with clean, modern culinary practices. We churn our gelato at a significantly slower pace compared to traditional ice creams. This guarantees a remarkably dense, velvety consistency that melts perfectly in the mouth.

✦ Fresh Vine-Picks

Picked at sunrise, processed immediately to seal the delicious, vibrant sweet nectar flavor.

✦ Pasture-Fed Dairy

Only premium organic cow’s milk from local family-owned bio-farms with lush green grazes.

Interactive Gelato Builder ➔
Interactive Kitchen

Build Your Custom Scoop

Mix, match, and stack layers of our award-winning gelato flavors and artisanal cones. See your masterpiece update live in real-time before sending it to our chefs!

Curated Catalog

Churned Masterpieces

Explore our classic selections available for instant order. Each crafted with our signature slow-churn process.

Bestseller $4.50

Ruby Raspberry Velvet

Infused with wild mountain red raspberries and light, floral Madagascar vanilla hints. Silky, rich, sweet milk base.

Gluten Free
Seasonal $4.50

Oceanic Teal Peppermint

Refreshing garden mint churned with high-percentage dark chocolate shavings and our signature blue-cyan hue.

Classic
Gourmet Choice $6.75

Volcano Lava Split

Hot double chocolate cake base, topped with vanilla gelato scoop, raspberries, and cascading warm fudge.

Rich Premium
Exclusive $6.20

Golden Pistachio Crown

Grounded Mediterranean roasted pistachios, sweet vanilla foam, gold sprinkles, and pistachio crumbs.

Nut Lovers
Hot & Cold $4.95

Midnight Affogato

Double-shot rich organic espresso poured hot over an cold artisanal creamy vanilla bean gelato scoop.

Caffeine Classic
Freshly Baked $7.50

Artisanal Waffle Basket

Crispy baked sweet-malt waffles served warm, with dual signature gelato scoops, raspberry reduction and icing.

Warm Feast
Gourmet Catering

Host An Unforgettable
Creamery Bar

Whether it is a premium corporate product launch, wedding celebration, or intimate party - we bring our artisan rolling customizer stations, professional churn master chefs, and our secret raspberry gelato reserves straight to you.

45+ Artisan Recipes
15k Cones Served
100% Natural Sourcing
25+ Catering Partners
Sweet Whispers

Gelato Love Letters

Read the genuine experiences shared by culinary critics and luxury dessert lovers.

★★★★★

"The slow-churn density is real. You can feel the absolute velvet richness in every scoop. The Ruby Raspberry flavor took me back straight to Italian summer orchards."

AM

Aline Miller

Michelin Guide Contributor
★★★★★

"I built a triple stack custom cone with chocolate drip cone, raspberry core and vanilla. It is a work of pure art, and the online tracker made ordering and delivery so seamless."

JD

Jameson D.

Self-Proclaimed Connoisseur
★★★★★

"C&A provided catering for our product launch of 150 people. The customizer rolled in, the chef spun and churned. Everyone was absolutely blown away. Outstanding service!"

VS

Victoria Sterling

Event Director, Vogue Group

Indulge in artisanal pastry arts, handcraft beverages, slow-churned gelato varieties, and custom cone configurations. Made daily with unyielding love.
